title: spilanthes decumbens
intro: Spilanthes decumbens, also known as creeping spilanthes, is a type of herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Spilanthes decumbens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve oral health, and support the immune system. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
